what_was_done: Full ZK circuit (kernel+Merkle), benchmarked (56k cycles), SP1Verifier contract, deployed ThresholdVerifier+WrappedTRS to BSC testnet, 1000 wTRS minted
known_issues: Build requires USE_UPNP=- flag (miniupnpc not installed)
Qt GUI not build-tested (only daemon build verified)
Groth16 proving needs SP1 Prover Network API key or CUDA GPU
next_steps: Unit tests for permanent staking (IsPermanentStakeScript, GetWeight, consensus rules)
Build and test Qt wallet (qmake + make)
Torus-core regtest node for real deposit testing
SP1Verifier integration — Groth16 wrapping (needs API key)
Relayer service — watch torus-core deposits, submit ZK proofs to BSC
